phases.title: Update default panel sizes to 15/70/15
phases.content: Update the DEFAULT_SIZES constant in layoutStore.ts to set sidebar=15, main=70, detail=15. Also update any fallback defaults in unused wrapper components (AppLayout.tsx, Sidebar.tsx, MainContent.tsx, DetailPanel.tsx) for consistency.
verification: layoutStore.ts DEFAULT_SIZES has sidebar: 15, main: 70, detail: 15
All hardcoded panel size defaults across layout components are consistent at 15/70/15
